title: Bittersour
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1348/868/minecraft_-forge-1.png) Adds citruses: lemon, lime, yuzu, grapefruit, tangerine, bergamot; a lot of new drinks and foods, new citrus wood type, plants: citronella flowers and lemongrass; and biomes: long, round, mixed lemonade forests   __Also compatible with other mods:__
Spoiler

Bergamot tea with [Let's Do] Herbal Brews or Farmer's Respite

Lemon ice cream with Neapolitan

Limeade float with Abnormals Delight

Lemon gummy with Collector's Reap

Tangerine popsicle with Farmer's Delight

Limoncello with [Let's Do] Vinery
